category_sources: source_facts.description says JSON/YAML linter supporting OpenAPI and AsyncAPI; official Stoplight page describes Spectral as an API style guide enforcer and linter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official Stoplight and GitHub docs refer to Spectral and @stoplight/spectral-cli.
docs_sources: Official Stoplight docs are linked from the official Stoplight Spectral page; GitHub README includes installation, usage, and documentation links.
repo_sources: Official Stoplight Spectral page links View on GitHub to github.com/stoplightio/spectral; source archive package is @stoplight/spectral-cli.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub README topics and overview list JSON/YAML linting, OpenAPI, AsyncAPI, Arazzo, and rulesets.
